headline: Why GENZ’s High Yield Can’t Survive Its Shift From Casinos to Apps
summary: The ticker investors used to know as VanEck Gaming ETF (NASDAQ:BJK) officially converted to the VanEck Digital Native Economy ETF on April 9, 2026, trading under the new symbol GENZ. The fund still sits in many income-oriented portfolios because of its $1.36 annual distribution paid in February 2026, which works out to a trailing yield ... Why GENZ’s High Yield Can’t Survive Its Shift From Casinos to Apps
